[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0010000000 1
1 0000010000 1
2 0000010100 2
3 1101000001 4
4 0011101100 5
5 1100101110 6
6 1111101111 9
7 1001001011 5

01 10 0000101100 3
12 21 1100101110 6 match 5
23 32 1001001011 5 match 7
34 43 0000001010 2
45 54 0010000000 1 match 0
56 65 0000010000 1 match 1
67 76 1000000001 2
70 07 0011001000 3

02 20 0011101100 5 match 4
13 31 1000001010 3
24 42 0010001010 3
35 53 0001000000 1
46 64 0000000000 a
57 75 0011000000 2
60 06 0000000100 1
71 17 1100001000 3

14 41 0000001010 2

36 63 1000000001 2
47 74 0010001000 2
50 05 0011100000 3
61 16 1000000100 2
72 27 1111001001 6
